# date: Apr 13, 2019
# content: Just for memo



Environment
====================
account:	admit
passwd:		acctatpi~year5
vncserver:	abcd1234

先插好 HDMI 接線再開機，避免訊號輸出至 RC

常用指令
----------
sudo poweroff
startx
sudo raspi-config
sudo /etc/rc.local
sudo update-rc.d -f ssh defaults 20		# allow ssh login
sudo reboot
sudo sync && sudo shutdown -r now

sudo apt install tightvncserver	passwd:1234abcd
	vncpasswd
	vncserver -geometry 1024x768 :1
	vncserver -list
	vncserver -kill :9
	vnc://192.168.1.121:5901
	sudo systemctl stop vncserver-x11-serviced.service
dosbox
	edit conf => usescancodes=false



Docker
====================
Install
----------
curl -fsSL get.docker.com -o get-docker.sh && sh get-docker.sh
sudo groupadd docker					# optional
sudo usermod -aG docker user_name		# sudo gpasswd -a user_name docker
sudo systemctl restart docker
newgrp - docker

docker run hello-world

sudo systemctl enable docker


Registry
----------
https://hub.docker.com/u/armhf/
https://hub.docker.com/u/hypriot/
https://hub.docker.com/u/resin/
https://hub.docker.com/u/armbuild/
https://hub.docker.com/u/armv7/


Trobule shooting docker-engine fail
----------
edit /etc/login.defs
	#SYS_GID_MIN 100 =>	SYS_GID_MIN 100
	#SYS_GID_MAX 999 => SYS_GID_MAX 999




RetroPie
====================
設定語系
----------
locale
	# sudo locale-gen en_US.UTF-8 UTF-8; sudo update-locale en_US.UTF-8 UTF-8; sudo export LANGUAGE=en_US.UTF-8  
	# sudo export LC_ALL=en_US.UTF-8; sudo export LANG=en_US.UTF-8; sudo export LANGUAGE=en_US.UTF-8  
	# sudo reboot


安裝 RetroPie 
----------
sudo apt install git lsb-release
su - pi
git clone --depth=1 https://github.com/RetroPie/RetroPie-Setup.git
cd RetroPie-Setup
chmod +x retropie_setup.sh
sudo ./retropie_setup.sh	# choose complete install
	# sudo rpi-update, if libbrcmEGL.so not found.


設定 RetroPie
----------
sudo ./retropie_setup.sh
	#  tools>>autostart => Start EmulationStation at Boot: Boots into EmulationStation
sudo vi /etc/inittab
	# 1:2345:respawn:/sbin/getty --autologin pi --noclear 38400 tty1


開始遊戲
----------
run command emulationstation in the terminal	# 初次執行會出設定搖桿畫面
rom => ~/RetroPie/roms/emulator_name


SSH to emulationstation
----------
nohup emulationstation &
chmod +x ~/ex.sh && vi es.sh
	#!/bin/bash
	export DISPLAY=:0  
	nohup emulationstation &  


Trouble shoot
----------
VolumeControl::Init() - Failed to attach to default card 
	vi /boot/config.txt (option, for no sound)
		# dtparam=audio=on
		# hdmi_drive=2
		# hdmi_force_hotplug=1
		# hdmi_force_edid_audio=1

VolumeControl::init() - Failed to find mixer elements
	raspi-config，audio => HDMI
    sudo ./retropie_setup.sh，audio => HDMI
    RetroPie ，audio => HDMI

More shader
	retropie_setup.sh => Configuration tools => 140 RetroArch => Online Updater => Update GLSL Shaders

General shader
	retropie_setup.sh => Configuration tools 804 configedit => libretro => default option
	retropie => Configuration Editor => Video Smoothing False => True

"controller not configured​"
	sudo nano /opt/retropie/configs/all/retroarch.cfg	
		# input_joypad_driver = "udev" => sdl


URL
----------
http://homtang.com/retropie/




設定無線網路固定網址
====================
edit /etc/network/interfaces
	auto lo
	iface lo inet loopback

	auto eth0
	iface eth0 inet dhcp

	allow-hotplug wlan0
	auto wlan0
	iface wlan0 inet static
	address 192.168.1.121   
	gateway 192.168.1.1
	netmask 255.255.255.0
	network 192.168.1.1
	broadcast 192.168.1.255
	wpa-ssid "xxxx"
	wpa-psk "xxxx"
	key_mgmt=WPA-PSK

	wireless-power off
	iface default inet dhcp

sudo reboot




設定螢幕解析度
====================
config.txt 取消註解
	hdmi_safe=1				# 安全啟動 HDMI
	hdmi_drive=2			# 強制使用 HDMI
	config_hdmi_boost=4		# 640x480 60Hz，mode=9  => 800x600 60Hz；mode=16 => 1024x768 60Hz； mode=82 => 1080p 60Hz

進入 Raspbian 終端機
	tvservice -d edid.dat
	edidparser edid.dat

編輯 Raspbian /boot/config.txt
	# hdmi_safe=1
	hdmi_group=2			# DMT=2, CEA=1
	hdmi_mode=47			# mode=47   1440x900   60 Hz

重開機
	sudo reboot

參數意義
	hdmi_drive：設定要驅動 DVI (1) 還是 HDMI (2)，必須使用 HDMI ，也就是設定為 2 才會有聲音。
	hdmi_group：用來指定要使用 CEA 或 DMT 的格式設定解析度。
	hdmi_mode：當 hdmi_group=2，而 hdmi_mode=16 時，表示使用 1024x768 60 Hz 的解析度。
	 hdmi_mode=69   1920x1200  60 Hz  
	 hdmi_mode=70   1920x1200  75 Hz
	URL: http://elinux.org/RPiconfig




中文設定
====================
sudo raspi-config
	Internationalisation Options => Change Locale => zh_TW.UTF-8 UTF-8 => zh_TW.UTF-8 => 重新開機

安裝中文輸入法
	sudo apt-get install scim scim-tables-zh scim-chewing
	 # 同時按下Ctrl及空白鍵，即可切換中文輸入法

安裝中文字型
	sudo apt-get install ttf-wqy-zenhei





遠端桌面控制
====================
使用 VNC
----------
sudo apt install tightvncserver
sudo tightvncserver
	# 設定密碼 & 完全存取
vncserver :1 
	# 設定 VNC Server 連線位置為 1。也可為 2 或其他號碼


XRDP
----------
sudo apt install xrdp tightvncserver
sudo systemctl enable xrdp




設定 SWAP
====================
cutomized swap size
----------
edit /etc/dphys-swapfile
	#CONF_SWAPSIZE=100
	CONF_SWAPFACTOR=2
	CONF_MAXSWAP=xxxx	# MiB

sudo service dphys-swapfile restart && swapon -s


auto swap size
----------
edit /etc/dphys-swapfile
	CONF_SWAPSIZE=xxxx	# MiB

sudo service dphys-swapfile restart && swapon -s


swap on USB
----------
make a ext4 system on a usb sticker, as /dev/sda1
blkid
edit /etc/fstab, add /dev/sda
	UUID=xxxx-xxxx...	/usbdisk	ext4	defaults	0	0
sudo mkdir /usbdisk
mount -a && df -h
edit /etc/dphys-swapfile
	CONF_SWAPFILE=/usbdisk/swap
sudo service dphys-swapfile restart && swapon -s
sudo swapoff /var/swap




安裝 Raspberry
====================
下載 raspbian stretch lite 或其他鏡像 img
鏡像 dump 至 SD Card
	dd if=/path/to/img_file of=/dev/sd_card bs=8M
設定無線網路環境
	touch /boot/wpa_supplicant.conf, add the follows:
	country=TW
	ctrl_interface=DIR=/var/run/wpa_supplicant GROUP=netdev
	update_config=1

	network={
		ssid="SSID_NAME"
		psk="SSID_KEY"
		key_mgmt=WPA-PSK
		scan_ssid=1
	}
啟用 SSH
	touch /path/to/raspberry_pi/boot/ssh
開機：先插入鍵盤、滑鼠，接著開啟螢幕，插上 HDMI，最後插上樹莓派電源。
組態設定
	sudo raspi-config
